Class SchedulerService

Namespace
BLL
Assembly
BLL.dll

Singleton background scheduler that periodically triggers CalcularSaldoMensual().

public class SchedulerService
Inheritance
object
SchedulerService
Inherited Members
object.ToString()

object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Uses a double-checked lock to prevent concurrent job executions. The job fires 5 seconds after Start() is called, then repeats every hour.

Properties

Instance

Returns the singleton instance, creating it lazily on first access.

public static SchedulerService Instance { get; }

Property Value

SchedulerService

Methods

Start()

Starts the background timer if it has not already been started. Safe to call multiple times; subsequent calls are no-ops.

public void Start()
